Jupiter is in Aquarius • with Dh.
Venus and Mercury in 7th to him. His
name is Syed or Satyanarayan. It is represented by the above combination and
both names have 'Sa' at the beginning.
In this chart as the Sun is placed in Cancer, with Mercury and Venus in
2nd to him, the native's father had the name Syed Khader starting with the
letter 'Sa'.
The native of this chart will have progressive times from his 44th year.
